subcodes.first_line: The Book from Us unto him who hath migrated unto God and attained the lights of the countenance of his Lord, the Most Exalted, the Most Great, that his heart may be gladdened thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن هاجر الی الله و فاز بانوار وجه ربه العلی العظیم لیفرح به قلبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
